choices: You are being asked to take part in a research study. Before you decide to participate in this study, it is important that you understand why the research is being done and what it will involve. Please read the following information carefully. Please ask the researcher if there is anything that is not clear or if you need more information.

• Title of Study: Stylistic differences in scientific writing
  • Researchers: Neele Falk, Filip Miletić
  • Department: Institute for natural Language Processing (IMS)
  • University: University of Stuttgart
  • Contact: {neele.falk, filip.miletic}(AT)ims.uni-stuttgart.de

You are invited to participate in a study that analyzes stylistic differences in scientific writing within the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP). In this experiment, you will rate 20 pairs of texts taken from scientific papers, in each pair deciding which of the two texts aligns more with a series of statements. This will enable us to better understand the effect of writing choices on subjective reading experience.
There are no known risks involved in this procedure. Your participation is not remunerated and does not entail any other material benefits.

Your participation in this study is voluntary. It is up to you to decide whether or not to take part in this study. If you decide to take part in this study, you will be asked to sign this consent form by clicking on the corresponding box. After you sign the consent form, you are still free to withdraw at any time and without giving a reason. Withdrawing from this study will not affect the relationship you have, if any, with the researchers. If you withdraw from the study before data collection is completed, your data will be returned to you or destroyed.
Your responses to this experiment will be anonymous. Please do not provide any identifying information. Every effort will be made by the researchers to preserve your confidentiality.

If you have questions at any time about this study, or if you experience adverse effects as the result of participating in this study, you may contact the researchers using the information provided above.

I have read and I understand the provided information and have had the opportunity to ask questions. I understand that my participation is voluntary and that I am free to withdraw at any time, without giving a reason and without cost. I understand that I will be given a copy of this consent form. I voluntarily agree to take part in this study.

text: I want to participate in this research and continue with the study.
